Now I have a complete understanding of the error chain. Let me write the diagnostic report:

**Root cause:** Task titles in the database (generated by `roadmapService.ts:192-253` or `studyPlanService.ts:232-322`) don't match any of the 18 hardcoded content templates in `ieltsContent.ts:420`. When "Start Next Task" navigates to `/study/:title`, `getContentByTitle()` (`ieltsContent.ts:438`) returns `null`, triggering the error state in `StudyContentPage.tsx:346-348`. The "Create" suffix is simply the task title being displayed — e.g., a task titled "Create a daily study plan" would show "Content not found: Create a daily study plan".
